phases.title: Ship Loop → Slack Notify Bridge ⭐ **NEW**

tasks.title: Implement src/server/routes/notify.ts
tasks.description:
New: POST /api/notify endpoint

REVIEW FAIL (code): Type Safety — DM-004.
  WHERE: src/server/routes/notify.ts:24,75,84
  EXPECTED: Specific types for payload and error (e.g., NotifyPayload, Error).
  ACTUAL: backend: (payload.backend as any), payload: payload as any, (error as any).message
  FIX: Replace 'any' with proper types. Ensure NotifyPayload uses Zod for validation.
  GATE: gates/T007-gate.sh assertion #2
  REF: plan.md Phase 7 > Type Dependency Graph

tasks.title: Implement scripts/dev/agent-run.sh
tasks.description:

REVIEW FAIL (code): NOT IMPLEMENTED — task was not completed.
  WHERE: scripts/dev/agent-run.sh
  EXPECTED: gwrk_notify calls at phase_start, phase_complete, phase_fail, ci_result, review_ready.

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/ship.ts

  ACTUAL: backend: backend as any
  FIX: Replace 'any' with AgentBackend type from src/server/types.ts.
